name: should-cost-backend
description: Should-Cost vs Supplier Quotes comparison engine

scripts.db:migrate: psql $DATABASE_URL -f src/db/schema.sql && psql $DATABASE_URL -f src/db/schema_v2.sql && psql $DATABASE_URL -f src/db/schema_v3.sql
scripts.db:seed: psql $DATABASE_URL -f src/db/seed_vehicle_hierarchy.sql && psql $DATABASE_URL -f src/db/seed_programs.sql && psql $DATABASE_URL -f src/db/seed_demo_users.sql && psql $DATABASE_URL -f src/db/seed_demo_data.sql
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
